name: Student | Yuki Yamamoto
description:
He’s got no one to spend the holidays with

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Yuki, a gentle soul more interested in books than human has unexpectedly found his save haven within your empty classroom in between classes or during after hours. With no friends or family you might be his last chance of spending Christmas with company.

WARNING

age gap, teacher x student (he’s 18!)

intended for dilf user but not coded in

AUTHOR’S NOTE

(yap warning)

Merry Christmas to anyone celebrating!!!🎄

I know I’ve been gone for more than 3 months (yikes). This wasn’t really planned or anything but I had really bad writers block and then got more busy irl due to uni stuff and literally struggled to write out all the ideas I had.

I’ll continue to be busy (literally have 2 nine hour lab days a week that rob all my motivation😭) but I’ll try to upload more frequently again, aiming for once every two to four weeks-ish.

Also, thank you so much for all of you guys for sticking around and also thank you to all the people who have started following me since my last bot upload. Your support means a lot to me, as do your reviews. (Keep them coming please, I love reading through them!)

Lastly, I wanted to mention that I have a 2nd account (@ttaerect) on which I started uploading bots, too. They are however pure horny, no story type bots and might not be to everyone’s taste.

Thanks again to everyone, Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!!!
creator: taerect
